reviews.review_description: I liked everything about it. I just couldn't find a good online session.

reviews.review_title: The game is good in theory
reviews.review_description:
I just started playing the beta and I understand that it is only a beta but I have a list of things I think the game needs to reach its full potential. 

1. (The bullets) When you shoot a gun there is a visible line that should be were the bullet is but it lags behind the bullet and makes hitting shots harder than I'd like it to be.

2. (The HUD) I feel like the HUD is too low and hard to see, ant that could be solved by having a HUD height setting in the menu.

3. (The cosmetics) I think that it makes sense for the battlepass being $12.00 is fine but a lower price would be nice, but the fact that all the cosmetics in the game cost money kinda sucks because I, like many other players feel like they don't want to spend money on the game yet. And I think that there should be an account level system as well as a battlepass so you could earn rewards when your account levels up.

But if all these things are fixed (with a bit of polishing)  
The game has the potential to be great.

developer_response.body: Hey CaptainWolf thank you for your great feedback, we'll work on that!

reviews.review_description: Nick from NickMoses05 Gaming Podcast here and I gotta take this moment to speak about this game.  First for anyone just learning about it, it is in pre-alpha stages so things are still being worked on.  If you are looking for a more polished beta version I am sure it will be coming soon because within the matter of 1 month I have seen huge changes to this game.  Maps are huge, weapons and abilities are a plus, along with nive visual and movement mechanics. The Atlassia VR team has been amazing! Will be posting an interview with some of the development team soon and looking forward to more.  With great smart minds working nonstop on this, it will be out before we know it.  Nice work guys

developer_response.body:
Hello Wesley, Thanks for your feedback!

In the options, you can choose between hold to sprint or toggle sprint on/off.
Is that what you're looking for? If not, you can reach us on Discord and describe more the problem and we'll try to find a fix. https://discord.gg/BK5FUz5tGr

reviews.review_title: DO I need to say more

reviews.review_description:
The best vr battle royale you will find on the market. Fast paced action, unique characters, great art style, and fun gun play. Other games are too slow and too repetitive, but in atlas endgames you have complete freedom to play your way and every match feels unique and fun

Hundred percent recommend trying out, especially with it being absolutely free. Go play it right now and trust me, you will be satisfied

developer_response.body: Thank you Unequals for your comment, happy to hear you enjoyed the community playtests! We are now preparing the open beta to allow anyone to join and have fun. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun and has many fun characters to play as, but it does have a few bugs. It is very fun but for now it deserves 4 stars, in the near future it could easily become a 5 star game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're actively working on resolving bugs. Feel free to join our Discord to report any issues or share your suggestions. https://discord.gg/BK5FUz5tGr

reviews.review_title: I need help. I had a account but I can’t
reviews.review_description:
Login because I don’t remember the password and like, can I give you my email and you can help me out?
The account was Harry

developer_response.body: For assistance, please contact us on Discord (link available in the game description) or via the form on our website: www.atlasendgames.com.

reviews.review_description: I love the game and was very surprised to find out it was the only one of its kind even with apex being such a big game i love the game a top battle royal style game with the apex twist very easy to understand controls and a very kind and chill creator and lastly pretty frequently updated for a game of recent opening

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We have many more updates on the way—stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
I joined after seeing an ad for it, I joined, selected a character and went. It was just a big map and if you get killed (or randomly die from just walking around, this happened twice) once killed I realized I wasn’t the selected character and there was no respawn or way to join back. You have to shut the game off and restart it. 
Picking stuff up was clunky, controls were clunky and unclear. I reached over my back and grabbed which brought up a menu a foot from my face that you can’t see through and can’t get rid of.

This game has potential from what I saw in the AD but it’s not ready for release. 

Now for the AD, the ad itself was fine but the title was misleading (said it was the first vr battle royal game) and comments were toxic.

developer_response.body:
(08/05/2022)
Hello,

Sorry to hear your disappointment, those bugs will be fixed in the next release.
The game is still in a pre-alpha state and far from being released.

reviews.review_description: GET ITTT!! It’s a amazing game!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, Shorty! Glad you enjoyed the community playtest! The next step is the open beta in a couple of weeks!

reviews.review_description: Do i need to say why... ITS TF2!

reviews.review_title: One of the best game with big Potential
reviews.review_description: I love this game and found it through lovely streamer (Tridus, Enchanted and Mrman). It has so many funny moments and good gameplay.

If you guys could just completely reset the quality it would look way better and Waymore playable

There’s also a glitch where it looks super cursed, using zip lines

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, the game just released, we are pushing improvements every 2-3 days

reviews.review_description: It's a good game, it just has one bug I'm aware of. That would be the menu glitching out, as I have said in my last review. It doesn't always align with the player, and sometimes spawns so far away as to not be useful. I'd also like to update about the other bug I experienced, where passthrough would glitch out while playing. This turned out to be a personal device issue, and has since been solved.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. The menu problem you described will be fixed in the next update. I would love to know more about the passthrough issue, as it is the first time we've heard about it. You can contact us through Discord via www.atlasendgames.com

reviews.review_description:
THIS IS A PRE-ALPHA SO EVERYTHING IS SUBJECT TO CHANGE OR BE IMPROVED SO THIS OPINION IS NOT FINAL!


Here's my game review thing everyone does:


Controls:

[] Perfection
[] Very playable
[] Pretty good
[✅] Ok
[] Meh
[] How do I move?


Graphics:

[] Half life Alyx, is that you?
[] "Ooh, I'm blinded by the graphics"
[] Pretty solid
[] A'ight
[✅] Fine enough
[] Kinda bad
[] GOD IS THIS RUNESCAPE?


Replayability:

[] Forget my life, I'll do this all day every day!
[] Boneworks
[] Play almost every day 
[✅] Play every so often (plz add friend list)
[] Not much 
[] Played once, can't touch again


Difficulty: 

[] Call this game dark souls!
[] Can't beat the tutorial
[] Hard egg
[] Depends how you want it
[✅] Moderate
[] Little easy
[] Get your dog and they'll beat it


Frustration levels:

[] Cuphead MOVE OUT OF THE WAY!
[] Bye bye VR headset
[] Gonna strangle someone
[] Pretty God darn frustrating
[✅] Pretty annoying
[] Not too bad
[] Never gotten angry once in my life


Chillness:

[] You call this chill, YOU CALL THIS CHILL?!?!
[✅] Not even close BABY
[] Inbeetween
[] Kinda chill
[] Pretty chill
[] Forget going to Hawaii, this is better!


Overall rating:

[] ⅒
[] 2/10
[] C/10
[] 4/10 
[✅] ½
[] 6/9
[] 7/11
[] ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
[] 9/10
[] 10/10 BABYYYYY
[] GOD TIER!


Conclusion:

The foundation is there but it needs some work and polish. One thing that DESPERATELY needs to be added is a pause/in-game menu where you can open up, leave match (but add a timed penalty for anyone who leaves before they die), and a settings menu. Maybe to change the controls and settings for seated and standing mode (as the game is currently seated mode only) and I would love to duck in real life and not in-game, and also to change rotation speed (PLEASE ITS SO SLOW!) Also some of the abilities feels slow or off, and whats-her-name being able to climb ANYTHING indefinitely really needs to be changed as that is mega op. And while I only got to play 2 games before the servers went down, I couldn't tell if they died or left but when someone is downed or killed, please leave something on their corps to pick up to revive them after death. Like reboot cards or banners. Lastly, please let us physically reload the guns as this is VR and one of the best things (and most popular things) about gun games is reloading the guns. If we press a button not only do we not get the fun and satisfaction, but it's also kinda ridiculous that EVERY GUN IN THE GAME, reloads in two seconds. [Special extra requests] (Please make it easier it swap guns like with instead a button press than very awkward shoulder and chest slots)             (Make it easier to open inventory and store as it's a hassle to reach all the way behind your back to open your inventory in a BR game)                   (And finally please make the slot hitbox bigger as you can put a gun or ammo all the way behind your shoulder, but instead only in front of your shoulder)

Thank you for listening to my rambling.

developer_response.body:
Hello, what you tried is an outdated version of the game since we are preparing an open alpha. (You were probably able to join the server because we were temporarily making server tests at this exact moment).

We plan to polish and add features the whole summer with weekly updates, mostly tackling everything you cited.

Thanks for taking the time to give your feedback, don't hesitate to join our discord to follow the progress: https://discord.gg/BK5FUz5tGr

reviews.review_description:
So, the game is in Beta so I won’t be too harsh, but it does need some things. 

First of all, the terrain is pretty flat, making for some uninteresting fights. Some rocks or other forms of cover scattered around would be nice. 

When I tried to use my medigun, it wouldn’t pull out a capsule, just grenades. It would be nice if it would automatically switch to capsules as soon as you pull out your medigun.

Speaking of health, it was hard to tell what health I was at, since that menu is at the bottom of your screen. Maybe if make it so you put your hand there and hold trigger it will make it bigger. It could also show other stuff like the map and the zone.

Another thing that made fights uninteresting was the low damage. I had to constantly reload my gun. Maybe a damage buff or a mag size buff would work.

Lastly, the lack of players. There was only 15 in my games, so I only fought once per match. The game doesn’t look too monetized, but if possible I’d strike a sponsorship with a vr YouTube to kinda get the word out. Another option are bot squads.


Things I liked:

The tutorial was in detail and taught me everything I need, though I would add a section for the glider and vehicles 

Vehicles were extremely fun. Flying up a cliff was cool.

The holster mechanics worked well, other than the medigun problem

I’m not sure how big your team is, but so far a good game. I will definitely come back after some updates

developer_response.body: Hey thank you for the feedback, most of the problems will get fixed this month!

reviews.review_description: This game is great. Has some bugs, but is a great time. If you like Apex, you have to give this a try. Also don't worry about one star, because every single one is outdated and everything has been patched.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We'll work hard until there is no single bug, and many new features to come!

reviews.review_description:
its the game I've been waiting for! its still in alpha at the minute so I don't get all the hate about bugs. I can totally see the potential, its far better than PopOne. 

the movement takes a little getting use to but once you do you'll be bouncing and climbing everywhere. 

shooting mechanics are great (firing animation not so much but again its still in alpha) 
honestly cant wait till this game  has the bugs fixed and comes out properly. 

Its a must try game anyone that likes BR games should play this
